Um, I think I should say a few things. Me di tremendo viajesote astral haciendo este bot, and when I woke up I saw this thing and was like: ._.XD What did I just create? Also, since I don't play WuWa, I think this has a lot of lore inaccuracies. Oh, and as for the lorebooks, I'm testing them out (These descriptions say a lot. xd); basically, I've been experimenting with way too many things with this bot. So, well, that's it. As always, I appreciate comments and criticism. Let me know if it's bugged so I can rewrite it xd
